name: genkit
description: Open-source framework for building AI-powered apps in JavaScript, Go, and Python, built and used in production by Google
summaryZh: Open-source framework for building AI-powered apps in JavaScript, Go, and Python, built and used in production by Google 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合想做自动化助手、多 Agent 编排和企业工作流的团队。
